content_body: The Roblee's love Crooked Creek Cabin! We came from Troy, AL for our first mini-vacation. 7 months ago we became the proud parents of a beautiful baby girl. We have been married for nine years, and she is our miracle. We wanted a quiet relaxing place for the three of us. This was the perfect place. One special thing Abbie loved was rocking in the rocking chairs on the porch, just listening to the creek. On the way in we stopped at the store for food and we didn't leave during our entire stay. Crooked Creek Cabin has become our special place, and we plan to come back very soon. Thank you for everything.
title: Baby's First Blue Ridge Vacation
